text.arabic:
اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الْكِتَاب
سَرِيعَ الْحِسَاب
اهْزِم الأَحْزَاب
اللَّهُمَّ اهْزِمْهُمْ وَ زَلْزِلْهُم
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma munzila ‘l-kitāb,
sarī`a ‘l-ḥisāb,
ihzimi ‘l-aḥzāb,
Allāhumma-hzimhum wa zalzilhum.

translations.en:
O Allah, Revealer of the Book,
Swift to account,
defeat the groups (of disbelievers).
O Allah, defeat them and shake them.
